heading: ***FLOOD WATCH FOR NORTHERN NY AND CENTRAL AND NORTHERN VT THROUGH THIS AFTERNOON***Today
text: Any morning rain showers, mainly east and north, tapering to a few stray snow showers. Some breaks of sun. Temperatures in the mid 30s west to near 50 east, falling to the 20s to low 30s north, falling into the 30s south. Winds shifting to the west 10 to 20 mph, gusting 30 to 40 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Gradual clearing west to east, clouds lingering through the northern mountains. Much colder. Lows in the teens to near 20 north, 20 to 25 south. Winds northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph this evening, diminishing to light.

heading: Friday
text: Some morning sun, then clouds returning, with a rising chance of snow or rain in the afternoon. Highs in the 30s to low 40s. Light winds, becoming south near 10 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph west of the Green Mountains.
